---
title: "Open Innovation in Science: Research Conference 2026"
description: "May 11-13, 2026 in Copenhagen, Denmark."
date: "2026-05-11"
---

We don't often find conferences that are a good fit for our work, but we
stumbled on the [Open Innovation in Science: Research Conference
2026](https://ois-research-conference.org), which aligned very well to
what we do. The conference focuses on bringing together people who want
to adopt or already use open and collaborative approaches in science,
with a focus on innovation activities between industry and
academia. So we sent a [submission](submission.qmd) and were accepted to
present a poster at the conference.

We presented the poster below at the conference.

![Poster presented at the conference.](poster.svg)
